svg.text: MDH & OIG Fraud Investigation — Proposed Architecture
Elastic as Unified Data, Query & Intelligence Layer
Eliminates need for ~100 manual verification calls
Automated checklist: time, date, signature, quals
Kibana — Dashboards, Discover, Canvas, Lens, Maps
Natural language queries across all case data
Auto-verify services rendered via doc cross-reference
Investigator copilot — summarize & suggest next steps
"Show me providers billing overlapping time slots"
Ad Hoc Python Scripting & IDE Access
